mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (name, category_id, price, status, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{status},#{description},#{image}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})

insert into setmeal_dish (setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies) values
(#{setmealDish.setmealId}, #{setmealDish.dishId}, #{setmealDish.name}, #{setmealDish.price}, #{setmealDish.copies})
